description: Updates the task item comment with ID supplied in path. Returns the updated comment.

schema.description: Normal view of task item comment

comment.description: The actual message of the comment

status.description: The status of the task item at the time this comment was created

id.description: Unique identifier of the login information.

name.description: The name that is associated with the login information.

login.description: The email address that is associated with the login information.

task_item_id.description: The task item id associated with the comment

created_at.description: The UTC datetime for the creation of the resource in ISO 8601 format.

updated_at.description: The UTC datetime for the last update of the resource in ISO 8601 format.

status.description:
The status of the task item at the time the comment.
Standard users who are assigned to a task item cannot change the status to closed or void.

attachments.description:
Attachments.
To upload attachments you must upload the entire payload as `multipart/form-data` content-type and
specify each parameter as form-data together with `attachments[]` as files.

drawing_revision_ids.description: Drawing Revisions to attach to the response

file_version_ids.description: File Versions to attach to the response

form_ids.description: Forms to attach to the response

image_ids.description: Images to attach to the response

upload_ids.description: Uploads to attach to the response

document_management_document_revision_id.description: PDM document to attach to the response
